motion_system: Slow marsh-breath drift with tiny optical shimmers, leaf tremors, and barely visible ripple rings moving outward from hidden anchor points.
color_drift: Blue-black water and pine green drift toward moss, peat brown, and pale skin-tone pink, with occasional muted lavender memory notes.
glow_behavior: Glow stays low and absorbed, appearing as dew-held halos inside glass, water, and mist rather than as beams or screens.
